3243290.name: Kaci Foxx Avenging Angel
3243290.description:
Kaci Foxx: Avenging Angel is a story driven action-adventure RPG with haunting choices and exciting combat.

“Will you choose Mercy … or Revenge? What will your choice cost you?”

Become a warrior. Step into the shoes of Kaci Foxx, a fierce warrior driven by vengeance after a tragic loss which nearly destroyed her.

Travel to exotic lands. With her heart hardened and skills honed, she embarks on a perilous journey through treacherous landscapes.

Battle Monsters. Kaci, and her extraordinary canine companion, Ember, will face formidable foes and uncover dark secrets as they struggle to survive insurmountable odds.

Hunt the ultimate evil. As she hunts down the man responsible for her suffering, Kaci grapples with her inner demons—each battle pushing her closer to the edge. Will she sacrifice her humanity for revenge, or can she reclaim her lost soul?

Face difficult choices. In this gripping tale of resilience and redemption, players must navigate Kaci’s tumultuous path toward justice and face impossibly difficult choices. Will you choose mercy? Or will you risk becoming the monster you hunt by choosing vengeance?
3243290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
